Landing.title: A branded, authenticated shell for football teams from day zero.
Landing.description: Clerk-backed auth, one active team context, a stable app frame, and a clean session echo surface.
Landing.featureOne: Clerk organizations resolve exactly one active team_id context per session.
Landing.featureTwo: BrandThemeV1 keeps product and company naming rules in one shared contract.
Landing.featureThree: Storybook, Playwright, and Lighthouse are wired from the same Phase 0 shell.

Auth.signInDescription: No account needed — this is a public demo. One click drops you into a live team workspace with sample analytics.
Auth.signUpDescription: New accounts land in the app shell once a team context is active.

AppShell.footer: Coverage Lab — a football analytics demo.

Dashboard.title: Team dashboard
Dashboard.description: Season analytics, explosive plays, and player stress resilience for the active team.
Dashboard.recentGamesDescription: Last five games for the active team context.
Dashboard.dciDistributionDescription: Decision complexity index spread across all scored plays this season.
Dashboard.explosivePlaysDescription: Plays where pre-snap DIS was below 0.25 - low defensive cohesion preceding a big gain.
Dashboard.resilienceRankingDescription: Players ranked by resilience score across sampled plays.
Dashboard.disTrendDescription: Defensive intensity stress average by week.
Dashboard.liveDataNote: Data is read live from the backend. Season analytics reflect the active team context.
Dashboard.apiUnavailableBody: This page needs the local API before live data can load. Start the full stack from the repo root with pnpm dev, or launch the backend directly if it is running on a different host.
Dashboard.apiUnavailableSection: Live data will appear here once the backend responds.

Catalog.title: Game catalog
Catalog.description: Browse and filter plays across games with DCI and DIS context.
Catalog.noResults: No plays match the current filters.
Catalog.liveDataNote: Data is read live from the backend. Play list reflects the active team context and applied filters.
Catalog.apiUnavailableBody: The catalog depends on the local API for games and play rows. Start the full stack from the repo root with pnpm dev, or point PROJECTEDGE_API_BASE_URL at a reachable backend.
Catalog.apiUnavailableCardTitle: Live catalog is waiting on the API
Catalog.apiUnavailableCardDescription: Filters and play rows will render after the backend is reachable.

Session.title: Authenticated session echo
Session.description: Core SessionContext fields are rendered with Clerk-backed auth state and the active organization.
Session.contractCardDescription: Frontend Phase 0 renders the backend-owned field names without inventing new transport names.
Session.detailsCardDescription: Clerk provides the current organization and role backing the active team context.
Session.notesCardDescription: This route is intentionally narrow: it verifies auth, team resolution, naming, and shell stability.

TeamContext.title: Resolve your active team context
TeamContext.description: Every authenticated session must operate inside exactly one active team_id context.
TeamContext.loadingDescription: Fetching your available teams from Clerk.
TeamContext.autoResolveDescription: A single membership was found, so Coverage Lab is activating it now.
TeamContext.emptyDescription: Create or join a team so the app can establish exactly one active team context.
TeamContext.selectDescription: Pick the team you want to open in this session.
